<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band05_chunk003.pdf#page=25 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band05 p148 -->

<!-- header: KLOSTER INDERSDORF -->

<!-- header: KLOSTER INDERSDOF -->


[[File:Band05_chunk003_p025_img001.jpg|thumb|C Gespräch Jesu mit der Samariterin am Brunnen]]



[[File:Band05_chunk003_p025_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band05 p149 -->
